did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Office of Regional Resources and Development publications,

origination.label: Creator:
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of Regional Resources and Development.

did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Various publications concerning city and regional planning, history, architecture, archaeological sites, and historic preservation in the Finger Lakes Region.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Various publications concerning city and regional planning, history, architecture, archaeological sites, and historic preservation in the Finger Lakes Region.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Office of Regional Resources and Development.

did.unittitle: Report of the Program and Operations of Cornell University from Sept. 1, 1965 through June 30,
Highway Route Location in the Finger Lakes-Southern Tier Region New York State
Historic Resources of the Finger Lakes-Southern Tier Region New York State (2 copies, one annotated)
Nuclear Power Plant in the Finger Lakes-Southern Tier Region New York State
Poverty in the Finger Lakes-Southern Tier Region New York State
A Regional Jetport the Finger Lakes-Southern Tier Region New York State
Regional Resources in the Finger Lakes-Southern Tier Region New York State
Rural Lands and Owners in the Finger Lakes-Southern Tier Region New York State

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Office of Regional Resources and Development publications, #4-10-1303. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
